name: codex-buddy-reviewer
description: One or two independent reviewers track exact Git changes in the background and finish with a compact Buddy review.

interface.shortDescription: Continuous independent review with an animated Buddy
interface.longDescription: Capture private exact Git checkpoints without screen access, run one or two isolated configured reviewers independently while Codex works, adopt only an exact final match, keep full attributed detail in a private local receipt, and append one compact grounded review paragraph through a safe Stop continuation.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-buddy-reviewer:buddy-review to toggle automatic review for this workspace.
Use $codex-buddy-reviewer:review to run a one-shot review of my current changes.
